gaps.title: Callback promise is implied by schedule fields
gaps.closureRule: Patient-visible callback expectation derives only from CallbackExpectationEnvelope.

gaps.title: Delivery optimism equals message truth
gaps.closureRule: No message may appear durably delivered, blocked, or review-ready without MessageDeliveryEvidenceBundle.

gaps.title: Provider retries create second sends or second callback outcomes
gaps.closureRule: CallbackAttemptRecord and MessageDispatchEnvelope are keyed by canonical fences and reconcile through one effect ledger.

gaps.title: Patient reply can skip command settlement and re-safety
gaps.closureRule: Replies settle through ConversationCommandSettlement and route into evidence assimilation and re-safety when indicated.

gaps.title: Self-care versus admin is a wording choice
gaps.closureRule: SelfCareBoundaryDecision is the sole classifier and subtype labels are downstream of boundary meaning.

gaps.title: Admin waiting is generic and indefinite
gaps.closureRule: Waiting requires a typed dependency shape, an owner, an SLA clock source, and patient-visible wording.

gaps.title: Admin completion can occur without typed proof
gaps.closureRule: Completed admin outcome requires AdminResolutionCompletionArtifact plus authoritative settlement.

gaps.title: Multiple live composers or loose reply affordances can coexist
gaps.closureRule: There may be one live composer and one authoritative patient reply path at a time for the current conversation cluster.

gaps.title: Delivery confidence can silently mark success
gaps.closureRule: Probabilities may widen pending or repair posture but may never manufacture answered, delivered, reviewed, or completed truth without evidence.
